description: Update the Zustand store (src/store/gameStore.ts) and WebSocket server (src/server/index.ts) to work with the new data model and game logic functions. The store needs new actions matching the new game phases and mechanics. The server needs to handle new message types.
steps: 1. Update GameStore interface to expose new actions: setupSeason, breakAlliances, formAlliance, drawMandateTiles, chooseMandateTile, executeCurrentMandate (for each player in resolution order), resolveKami, initiateWar, submitWarTacticBids, resolveNextBattle, cleanupSeason, resolveWinter.
2. Add state for: currentMandateResolutionIndex (which player is resolving), warTacticBidsSubmitted, selectedFigures (for recruit/marshal placement).
3. Keep hotseat mode working - current player advances through resolution order automatically.
4. Keep online mode WebSocket integration intact.
5. Update message handlers to match new action types: DRAW_MANDATE_TILES, CHOOSE_MANDATE, SUBMIT_WAR_BIDS, FORM_ALLIANCE, BREAK_ALLIANCE, PLACE_FIGURE, MOVE_FIGURE, BUY_CARD, ADVANCE_PHASE.
6. Ensure server-side game state updates use the new gameLogic functions.
7. Broadcast state updates to all players in lobby after each action.
acceptance_criteria: Server compiles without TypeScript errors (using tsx)
Store actions correctly call new game logic functions
Hotseat mode supports full game flow from setup through winter
verification: Run npx tsc -b and confirm no errors
